core_mechanism: Fredholm-determinant (and Pfaffian) representation of the counting statistics of a correlated point process — the probability of finding exactly k points in a region expressed as the determinant of an integral operator built from the process's correlation kernel restricted to that region, with its spectrum (operator eigenvalues) and large-region log-asymptotics extracted
brief_reason: The abstract computes the probability that a disk contains exactly k eigenvalues via Fredholm-determinant/Pfaffian representations whose eigenvalues and large-r logarithmic asymptotics are analyzed, which is the generic determinantal-point-process gap/hole-probability machinery independent of the random-matrix subject matter.
